hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true

if command -v actionlint >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -d "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.github/workflows" ] && ls "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/.github/workflows/*.yml >/dev/null 2>&1; then actionlint "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/.github/workflows/*.yml 2>&1 || true; fi

agent_dir="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/agents"; if [ -d "$agent_dir" ]; then recent=$(find "$agent_dir" -name '*.md' -mmin -60 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$recent" ]; then echo '[agent-staleness] WARNING: .claude/agents/ modified within last 60 min. Newly added agent types may not be loaded yet — if Agent tool returns "type not found", restart session (CLAUDE.md Operating Invariants).' >&2; fi; fi
